title: centrosema molle
intro: Centrosema molle, also known as sensitive plant or dormancy-sensitive plant, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centrosema molle include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Centrosema molle can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
